name: IRC_MESSAGE_TRACKING
description: This table tracks message metadata for all communication channels in HCM Communicate and Recruiting.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_TRACKING_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key of the table. System generated.

columns.Name: ADDED_BY_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the ID of the person triggering the message.

columns.Name: ADMIN_ALERT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to the table IRC_ADMIN_ALERT_HISTORY.

columns.Name: CONTACT_INFORMATION
columns.Comments: The communication contact information such as email, phone number, etc., as per channel type code.

columns.Name: CHANNEL_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: The code for the channel such as SMS, email etc., that is used to send the message to the person. Lookup codes of type 'ORA_IRC_INTERACTION_TYPE'.

columns.Name: CHANNEL_SUB_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores additional details about the channel type, such as whether the message was initiated by the user or the agent/system.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: The ID of the person who is receiving the message. Foreign key to PER_PERSONS table.

columns.Name: PRODUCT_CONTEXT
columns.Comments: The product such as HCM_COMMUNICATE, HCM_RECRUITING etc., for which the message belongs to.

columns.Name: PRODUCT_SUB_CONTEXT
columns.Comments: The product's sub context such as  ORA_SUBMISSION, ORA_PROSPECT, ORA_EVENT, etc., in which this message was sent for a product.

columns.Name: PRODUCT_SUB_CONTEXT_ID
columns.Comments: Provides the link to the product's sub context through  SUBMISSION_ID, PROSPECT_ID, EVENT_ID, etc. of tables IRC_SUBMISSIONS, IRC_PROSPECTS, IRC_REC_EVENTS_B etc.

columns.Name: CONTENT_LIBRARY_ITEM_CODE
columns.Comments: The Recruiting Content Library's DESCRIPTION_CODE that points to the table IRC_DESCRIPTIONS_B.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_API_STATUS
columns.Comments: Message API availability at the instance of sending a message depending on throttling rules imposed by the admin and if available API's call status.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_API_RESPONSE_CODE
columns.Comments: Message API status based on the unique API response code given by the message provider.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_DIRECTION
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the message is inbound  or outbound based on the flow of communication

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: PHONE_COUNTRY_CODE
columns.Comments: Country prefix for international phone numbers including area code, such as 33 for France

columns.Name: REQUEST_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Identifies the functional area or system component from which the API call to send a message is initiated

indexes.Columns: PRODUCT_CONTEXT, CHANNEL_TYPE_CODE, PERSON_ID, CREATION_DATE, CHANNEL_SUB_TYPE_CODE, ADDED_BY_PERSON_ID
PRODUCT_CONTEXT, CHANNEL_TYPE_CODE, CREATION_DATE, MESSAGE_API_STATUS, CONTENT_LIBRARY_ITEM_CODE, CHANNEL_SUB_TYPE_CODE, ADDED_BY_PERSON_ID
PRODUCT_CONTEXT, CHANNEL_TYPE_CODE, CONTACT_INFORMATION, CREATION_DATE, CHANNEL_SUB_TYPE_CODE, ADDED_BY_PERSON_ID
PRODUCT_CONTEXT, CHANNEL_TYPE_CODE, CREATION_DATE, PHONE_COUNTRY_CODE, MESSAGE_API_STATUS, MESSAGE_API_RESPONSE_CODE
